headline: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Valuation Check After Announcing Expanded US$1b Share Repurchase Plan
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) has drawn fresh attention after announcing plans to repurchase up to US$1b of its common stock in fiscal 2026, representing a US$250m increase under its existing authorization. See our latest analysis for Zimmer Biomet Holdings. Despite the enlarged 2026 repurchase plans and upcoming appearance at the Bank of America Global Healthcare Conference, the stock’s recent momentum has been weak, with the 30 day share price return down 14.37% and the 1 year total...
